description: Example QA set targeting the four arXiv papers listed in pdfs/README.md.

questions.question: What is the formula for scaled dot-product attention?
Why does the Transformer use multi-head attention instead of a single attention head?
How does Retrieval-Augmented Generation combine a retriever with a generator?
What is the difference between RAG-Sequence and RAG-Token?
What clustering algorithm does RAPTOR use to build its tree?
How does RAPTOR perform retrieval at query time?
What is the lost-in-the-middle effect when language models read long contexts?
Where in a long input do current language models perform best?
Compare RAPTOR's hierarchical retrieval to vanilla RAG.
What is the boiling point of mercury?
